name: Icing for Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the milk and flour mixture until thickened.
2. Whip the sugar, softened butter, vanilla extract, and butter flavoring together until smooth.
3. Gradually add the cold flour mixture to the whipped ingredients; beat until well combined and smooth.
4. Spread the icing over the cake layers and outside of the cake.
